info_CN: 减论Agent通过算法为您推荐
该方法基于预训练扩散模型实现了无需每场景微调即可从稀疏输入（仅一至两张图像）生成多视角一致的高保真3D编辑
包含参考多视角编辑器和任意视角视频合成器两大核心组件

a framework that enables multi-view consistent 3D editing from sparse inputs without per-scene optimization by repurposing pretrained diffusion models and incorporating a referring multi-view editor alongside an any-view-to-video synthesizer
info_EN: a framework that enables multi-view consistent 3D editing from sparse inputs without per-scene optimization by repurposing pretrained diffusion models and incorporating a referring multi-view editor alongside an any-view-to-video synthesizer
